productDisplayName: Nike Men Stripes Grey Polo Tshirts
description: CompositionBlack pique polo neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has thick dark grey stripes, black ribbed collar with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, swoosh logo embroidered on the upper right chest, CBF badge appliqued on the upper left chest, club tab towards the left hemline and vented hemsFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowWarm iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroideryCelebrate with the only team in history to win five championships with this black CBF polo neck T-shirt from nike. The thick black and dark grey stripes and the CBF seal brings in some of the Brasil CBF clubs sleek style to the tee, while the cotton fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long. Team this with jeans and sports shoes to cheer your team on and off the field.
